_comment: FIXTURE - full banter pack for one enemy Face (The Custodian, Office 3 / Death). All beats across low/mid/high Myth; jump covers jump/watch/open. In-voice, HUD-short, no emojis or em dashes.

lines.text: The Custodian steps in. It keeps the books on the dead.
The Custodian again. People are starting to know its name.
The Custodian arrives like a story already told. The room leans toward it.
A skull Face turns up. Custody, not kindness.
The skull Face. The one they whisper cleared the third Office.
The skull Face. The Archive and the Myth disagree on what it did to you last time.
Guard, throw, or back off. It is patient.
It has seen your move before. Pick anyway.
It already knows the line you will choose. Prove the story wrong.
It jumps. The room tightens around you.
It jumps the way the rumor said it would.
It jumps, and the Myth writes the bruise before you feel it.
It watches. No hit lands.
It watches, taking notes for the Archive.
It watches. Even its patience is a legend now.
It opens. A clean window appears.
It opens wider than the stories claim it ever does.
It opens, and for once the Myth owes you a debt.
The room clears. The Custodian files you under survived.
Cleared. The story gets a new line in your favor.
Cleared. The Myth will exaggerate this. Let it.
The room takes you. Death is a change in custody, not an end.
You fall. The Custodian was expecting the paperwork.
You fall into the story you helped write. Custody, as promised.
You back off. It lets the door stay open.
You flee. It marks the page and waits.
You flee, and the Myth keeps your seat warm.
